summary: Frontend-only SSG verification for iteration 18 (author-approved verbatim meta copy + Bernbach title + cannot-drumbeat + loyalty reorder + footer/about/connect changes). 25 of 26 pytest checks pass against the live preview via plain HTTP fetches (no JS). Browser hydration on the loyalty article is clean: 0 console errors, 0 hydration warnings, paragraphs in correct order, client-side nav still works. One real regression found: the sitewide Footer is missing entirely from /connect.

ui_bugs.issue: Sitewide <Footer> ('Founded 2020. More than forty years in the making.') is not rendered on /connect. The page ends with the 'Elsewhere' block and no footer element. All other pages (/, /about, /writing, /writing/wrap-rage, /about/discernment) render the footer correctly.

action_items: Add the shared <Footer /> to /app/frontend/src/pages/Connect.jsx (or restore it in the layout for that route). Then re-run pytest backend/tests/test_meta_verbatim.py::test_footer_founded_2020 to confirm.
critical_code_review_comments: Connect.jsx renders its own 'Elsewhere' block but appears to omit the shared Footer component, causing sitewide footer copy to be missing on that single route. Consolidate so Footer is always part of the layout, not per-page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 writing/about-discernment meta descriptions (name=description, og:description, twitter:description) match verbatim after HTML-entity decode. Bernbach <title> and H1 correct on /writing/you-cant-market.../ . 'cannot. Cannot. Cannot.' drumbeat present in your-call body. Loyalty paragraph order verified in SSG HTML: signup -> 'We're both "members."' -> 'Here's why it matters now' (indices 2559 < 2639 < 3021). About page has data-testid=about-gary-linkedin with correct href; Connect has data-testid=connect-link-linkedin. Share row for /writing/wrap-rage has encoded https%3A%2F%2Fmethodmarketinggroup.com%2Fwriting%2Fwrap-rage, X share, and mailto with subject+body — no empty url= params. Discernment '·' byline separator present. Connect email anchor uses <wbr/> with no visible space. Only failure: /connect page missing sitewide Footer.
rca of the issue: Grepping the served HTML for 'Founded 2020' returns 1 hit on /, /about, /writing, /writing/wrap-rage, /about/discernment and 0 hits on /connect. The Connect page apparently renders its own bottom 'Elsewhere' block instead of (or in place of) the shared Footer. Fix: import and render <Footer /> in Connect.jsx (or hoist Footer into the routes layout so all pages inherit it).
